node.text: Calvin released his album on the 11th of September, which received positive feedback and motivated him to make even better music.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "album release music") on Session 18 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Calvin threw a small party at his Japanese house last week to celebrate his new album with love and support from family and friends.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "album release music") on Session 28 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Calvin has had some great collaborations recently and his album is almost finished.

node.text: Calvin started shooting a video for his new album in Miami at an awesome beach for epic visuals.

node.text: Calvin values making a difference and sharing his own story through music.
